case_title: WILLIAMS GWENDOLYN MAE VS JAMES NATHAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $712.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS GWENDOLYN MAE AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES NATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS GWENDOLYN MAE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAMES NATHAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-21-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-06-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
POS INVALID AS TO JAMES NATHAN, NO DELIVERY OF CLAIM RECORDED.
